CustomField.formula: if(Active__c , Number_of_Item_Purchased_In__c + Number_of_Sample_Items_Checked_In__c + Number_of_Items_to_Resell__c - Number_of_Items_Dispatched__c - No_of_Items_Sold__c - Number_of_Items_Picked__c - Total_Items_In_Transit__c - No_of_Items_Reserved__c - Number_of_Items_In_QualityCheck__c - Number_of_Item_Discarded__c - Number_of_Items_Returned_to_Supplier__c - Number_of_Sample_Items_Checked_Out__c -MO_Scrapped_items__c ,0.00)
CustomField.label: Number of Items In Stock
